description_long: This range hood features a minimalist, boxy design with clean, straight edges and a smooth, metallic finish. The main body is a tall, rectangular column that extends vertically from a wide, flat base, which likely serves as the mounting or support surface. The front and rear faces are broad and unadorned, while the sides are narrower, giving the object a monolithic appearance. Subtle vent slits are visible near the top on the side views, suggesting the location of the exhaust or air intake. The entire structure appears to be constructed from stainless steel or a similar metal, with no visible buttons, handles, or decorative elements. The overall look is modern and utilitarian, suitable for contemporary urban kitchens or commercial environments.
description: A tall, rectangular range hood with a smooth metallic finish, wide base, and subtle vent slits near the top. Its minimalist, modern design is free of visible controls or decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view shows a broad, flat face with a wide base and no visible controls or vents.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the narrow profile and vent slits near the top of the column.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with a broad, flat surface and no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, displays vent slits near the top and a narrow profile.
attribute_vent_placement: Vents are placed near the top on both left and right sides of the vertical column.
